Services

What I can help your business with

From conversion-focused websites to more tailored business systems, the goal is to help your business look stronger, work smarter, and grow with less friction.

Website Design

Clean, modern layouts that help customers trust your business quickly and take action without confusion.

Website Development

Fast, mobile-friendly websites and tailored builds that look polished, perform well, and support real business goals.

Ongoing Support

Optional updates, maintenance, and improvements, with custom systems and advanced features available when your business needs more.

Portfolio

Selected projects that show the type of work I deliver

A mix of business websites and more custom operational systems, built to improve credibility, simplify workflows, and support growth.

Business Website

Construction Company Website

Built a modern website for a construction business to showcase services clearly, strengthen credibility, and help turn visitors into new client enquiries.

  • Clearly presents services
  • Builds trust with professional design
  • Mobile-friendly for customers on any device
Visit Project

Custom Business System

Construction Site Management System

Developed a custom system for managing construction site operations, helping teams handle daily workflows, staff activity, task tracking, and file uploads in one place.

  • Staff check-in / check-out
  • Holiday request management
  • Task tracking and uploads
  • Centralised workflow support
View System

Platform Product

Community & Event Management Platform

Contributed to a platform focused on community operations, event logistics, bookings, and payments, with work that supported product quality, mobile experience, and operational flow.

  • Community and event operations
  • Booking and payment flows
  • QR-based access support
  • Mobile testing and product design contribution
Explore Platform

Pricing

Clear pricing with room to scale

These packages cover most website projects, while support and monthly improvement options keep things flexible after launch.

Starter Website

EUR400 - EUR600

A strong starting point for businesses that need a professional, modern online presence without overcomplicating the build.

  • 1-3 pages
  • Mobile responsive design
  • Contact form
  • Fast and modern layout
Choose this plan

Business Website

EUR700 - EUR1200

Popular

For businesses that need a stronger online presence, clearer messaging, and a site built to support trust and lead generation.

  • 4-8 pages
  • Stronger business-focused design
  • Basic SEO setup
  • Performance optimisation
Choose this plan

Ongoing Support

EUR40 - EUR80 / month

Ongoing help for businesses that want their site kept up to date without having to manage every small change themselves.

  • Updates
  • Fixes
  • Small content changes
Choose this plan

Growth / Improvements

EUR80 - EUR150 / month

Best for businesses that want to improve results over time with new features, refinements, and steady website upgrades.

  • Feature additions
  • UX improvements
  • Performance tweaks
Choose this plan

Custom systems, advanced features, and more tailored business tools are quoted separately based on scope.

Contact

If your website is holding your business back, let's fix that.

If your business needs a stronger website or a more tailored digital solution, send me a message. I'll reply with a realistic quote and the best next step based on what your business actually needs.

Best fit for service businesses, local brands, construction, trades, fitness, hospitality, and operations-focused teams.

Website packages are fixed-range. More advanced systems and custom features are scoped separately.

Enquiries are sent directly by email. Most replies can be sent within 1 business day.

Final Call To Action

Better digital tools can help your business look sharper and run smoother.

If you want a modern website or a more tailored business system that supports growth, now is a good time to start the conversation.
